Reduced rate (debit 0.10%, credit 0.20%) for transactions <=EUR 20. Commercial tiered by merchant card volume (3 tiers) x merchant category, ranging 0.23%-1.05%; Central Travel Solution and Commercial Debit Premium products are flat 1.50% across all tiers (this is the true max, corrected 2026-07-18 after a user-reported discrepancy). No Contactless-specific tier exists for commercial -- Spain prices by merchant category x volume tier instead, so commercial_min/max remain the primary reference.
Contactless-specific rate not yet re-verified for this country -- headline uses the midpoint of the published range instead

Manually researched, not live-scraped -- see manual-mastercard-research.json

Switzerland is NOT EU/EEA and NOT bound by the IFR cap -- rates are set separately (Swiss Competition Commission COMCO settlement + Mastercard rate sheet). Debit uses a value-tiered structure (0.12% + CHF 0.30 for <=CHF 250-300, ~0.28% above) -- 0.12% shown here as the representative rate for typical transactions, confirmed independently by a COMCO press release. Consumer credit ranges 0.35%-0.55% across fee tiers -- Contactless (0.38%) used as headline for consistency with other countries.
